transcript.text: There are Top 3 instant tteokbokki eateries in Seoul and I've been to 'Apple House' and 'Miso's House' Now, this is the last instant tteobokki place of the Top 3 (Starting with the main 'Instant Tteokbokki') (And has spicy soft tofu ramyun/jjolmyun*) *Spicy cold chewy noodles (along with spicy noodles and dumplings  that are a perfect match with tteokbokki) (And that's not all?!) (There is strawberry bingsu*?) *Shaved ice dessert (They top it off with a bunch of strawberry marmalade) (along with ice cream and a drizzle of syrup...)

Bon appétit! (No words needed) (An All-Kill, including the bingsu) Hello, everyone Today, I'm here at Songpa-dong, Songpa-gu And I'm here to eat instant tteokbokki! I've eaten at a lot of famous instant tteokbokki places There are Top 3 instant tteokbokki eateries in Seoul and I've been to 'Apple House' and 'Miso's House' Now, this is the last instant tteobokki place of the Top 3 (Songpa-gu, Seoul) It's called 'Moggo Gie Danida' I came here because I heard they even have soft tofu jjolmyun that I've been wanting to try

What is 'Moggoji'? This is Moggoji.... A fun occasion...blah blah blah (Skips) ...I see And this place has been in business for over 30 years 32 years, I think?! (Let's head inside) I'll go in now (It has the exact old-school vibe) Wow, a cassette tape?! It's so vintage... (Traces of celebrities that visited here) Wow, autographs of famous celebs (Enters) Welcome (Enters) Hello (Signature dishes of 'Moggo Gie') The menu? Oh, the signature ones are over here (Signature dishes of 'Moggo Gie') Strawberry bingsu...That sounds delicious

(Choosing what to eat makes her the happiest) Spicy noodles with dumplings... (The owner's recommendation) If two people come, they can finish 8~90% of Set #1 and #2 (The owner's recommendation) If three people come, it's usually Set #3 or #4 How many servings can you fit in one pan? (4 servings is the maximum) We don't add more servings in between since it changes the taste So you can make up to 4 servings, right? Yes, that's the amount that we normally give (A dish that only regular customers know?!) Our regulars order what's called soft tofu ramyun

(A limited edition in 'Moggo Gie') and only those in this neighborhood eat this Then I'll have the 3-person set menu and the limited-edition soft tofu ramyun, please That's gonna be about 4.5 servings (That little?) Really? That's not much Oh, but actually, this much is an adequate amount! (

I can hear it...The sound of her pride firing up) Then I'll eat more afterwards (She'll be ordering more as she eats) I'll have some fried seaweed rolls as well - Just one more? - Yes (A sharp-tasting spicy and sweet instant tteokbokki) (The taste of soft tofu ramyun & jjolmyun  that only the regulars know) (A delicacy of 'Moggo Gie'!  Crunchy dumplings with spicy noodles) Thank you, oh, it looks so good! - Here is your spicy noodles with dumplings - Wow, thank you (The street food parade gets set up in a jiffy) Please mix the jjolmyun and eat it with the fried dumplings (The street food parade gets set up in a jiffy) Here is your soft tofu ramyun & jjolmyun

- For the jjolmyun dish, please stir from the bottom before eating - Alright! (Fried dumpling decor) (Top it off with fried seaweed rolls to complete the feast) Like this! Looks tasty! This is soft tofu jjolmyun! I've been wanting to try this dish for a long time now And this is soft tofu ramyun I need to loosen it up by mixing it (Ramyun noodles are a must for instant tteokbokki) Oh, there are ramyun noodles in here! Bon appétit! I'll start off with the noodles first, since they'll get soggy! (Anticipation is at its peak) I'll quickly taste this

(The first exciting bite of soft tofu ramyun) In one bite It's so good! The sauce is really tasty I'll get a spoonful of the soup as well The soup has jjajang* in it, but it's not unpleasant *Black bean sauce It's very clean (Now trying the main, rice cake) I'll eat the rice cake as well (Now trying the main, rice cake) It's instant tteokbokki, and I didn't try the rice cake yet I love it! I actually prefer tteokbokki made with rice than flour (This tteokbokki is good enough to break your preferences....!) But these freshly cooked, warm flour rice cakes

are very fluffy, chewy, and really delicious Should I try the fried seaweed roll? (Careful not to burn the roof of your mouth) Ouch, it's hot...! The outside is a little crispy and the inside is moist This dish has fried dumplings with some jjolmyun I'll take out the pickled radishes first (

Mix it real well...) I'll give this a try, jjolmyun! It's good The jjolmyun seasoning itself is really delicious! I'll finish this quickly since it'll get soggy! Soft tofu ramyun It's already soggy! This probably tastes the same, right? I'll give it a try It really tastes like soft tofu stew (A somewhat familiar street food flavor) but I can definitely taste that street food flavor! ('Soft tofu ramyun' that only a few people know) Is this the soft tofu ramyun that only the locals here eat? Rather than it having a very unique flavor,

it feels like a dish that everyone must've eaten once (A taste that brings back all the memories...!) But it makes you nostalgic and it's really delicious overall (Fried dumplings that haven't lost their crunchiness) I'll try one dumpling that I haven't dipped into the soup This is... So crunchy There are people who enjoy fried dumplings soggy like this and those who enjoy it crunchy But I like both ways (Peace Treaty) So I'll eat two plain and two of them dipped Wrap the noodles in a fish cake like this

One more fried seaweed roll! (The owner kept an eye on Tzuyang) I'm seeing if you're enjoying it or not... - It's really delicious, sir - Thank you My mother started this business first, my dad and my mom And it's been passed down to my generation Even now, my mother comes here to help me out It's been about 25 years for me 2

5 years...wow...! Those that eat soft tofu ramyun are a real fan! (The regulars all know) I can know they've visited after years once I get their order Damp fried dumpling (The dumplings are disappearing at a quick speed...) I'll get some jjolmyun (Firm & chewy noodles) The jjolmyun is slightly al dente rather than cooked all the way (Firm & chewy noodles) So the texture is...

Let's get cabbage (Cabbage + dumpling, a standard combo for dumplings with jjolmyun) and place it on top of the dumpling (Sneakily delivering Coke) Thank you The final highlight is the egg (Tzuyang has it all planned out) I'm going to add fried rice into here and eat it with soft tofu ramyun (The finishing touch) Then I'll have strawberry bingsu to wrap things up! It's time for the long-awaited egg...!

Cut it Mash it Wow...This is the stuff - Sir...!! - Yes Can I have fried rice? Do you want me to make fried rice? Wow, this is totally half-cheese and half-rice! (The cheese is covering the pan) I'll give this a try!

This is cheese rice (She is in complete awe) Amazing! Amazing!! Amazing!!! (Touched) (Cannot miss out on soft tofu jjolmyun) I'll give the soft tofu jjolmyun a taste as well (The soft tofu jjolmyun looks very spicy and sharp!) This looks so tasty! It's delicious! I'll fish out all the noodles (

She's fishing them out endlessly...) I left some of this to eat it with soft tofu jjolmyun and rice (A combination that cannot fail) Oh, I love it...Wow, it's so delicious eating it like this! (The owner reappears) It makes me full just watching you Oh, I have to try the bingsu as well (I should go call the strawberry bingsu...) Personally, both are delicious, but the one with cheese is more delicious (Tzu-man's soul paid a quick visit) Oooh, I love it (Strawberry bingsu is awaiting its entrance) Sir, will the strawberry bingsu be ready quickly?

(Strawberry bingsu is awaiting its entrance) Yes, it'll be out quick! (You must) (You must scrape up the bottom of the pan for fried rice) (I will finish everything before the bingsu arrives...!) (Strawberry bingsu that is perfectly old-school  with a bunch of strawberry marmalade) (

along with ice cream and a drizzle of syrup...) (The strawberry bingsu is complete) - You have to mix it well to get that old-school flavor - Oh, I need to mix it up? I think I'll spill everything if I mix it up (If so, he will coach her) Start from the sides first (Targeting the edges first) Lightly scrape the edges (

The reddish ice is being nicely mixed...) So you mix it up like this, I see? It's easier to mix than I thought Bon appétit! (A taste that automatically calls for a thumbs up) Wow, eating this after this really kills (Let's finish off the leftovers first) I'll eat all this and then eat it (Let's finish off the leftovers first) Only a bite...There's not much left anyway (Quickly entering her mouth) Cleared! (

She really ate it all...?) (Munching away without a thought) I feel like devouring these like "Whoa whoa whoa!"... (A fantastic scene he cannot get used to...) Wow, this is...the best It completely resets your palate The ice isn't that hard type from the old days either (The toppings are harmonious and it's even soft) Maybe it's because I mixed it well with the cream and marmalade (The toppings are harmonious and it's even soft) Even the ice is soft (Refreshing) Actually, if I just ended it with the instant tteokbokki, I would've just said I had a nice meal like a regular mukbang

(The ending bingsu completed the package) But eating bingsu at the end made it so good You have to eat this after eating tteokbokki The marmalade makes the ice very soft, so it kind of feels like a sherbet... We use a different ice Oh, you do? You know those blocks of ice back in the day? We put effort into shaving that, and it creates very soft, smooth ice (The secret to how the bingsu ice melts in your mouth) So doesn't it melt away in your mouth? Without feeling rough? (The secret to how the bingsu ice melts in your mouth) That's the charm of it

Oh, my teeth are cold... The strawberry bingsu is seriously the best (Thumbs up) (The dishes are completely empty now...) Gosh... that was such a good meal! I had a great meal once again Tzuyang, fighting! (The support from them makes her feel warm as well) Fighting! Thank you! (The support from them makes her feel warm as well) Fighting, 'Moggo Gie' hehe
